common.siteDesc: Baize Open Source Team provides practical tools such as image compression, CDN plugins, and Baize Toolbox to help developers improve efficiency and focus on core business development.

home.heroBadge: 🚀 Baize Open Source Team - A Frontend Team That Loves to Tinker
home.heroDesc: Baize Open Source Team provides practical tools such as image compression, CDN plugins, and Baize Toolbox to help developers improve efficiency and focus on core business development.
home.toolsDesc: Curated collection of the most practical development tools, one click away, boosting your productivity
home.imageCompressDesc: Smart image compression that maintains quality while significantly reducing file size, supporting multiple formats
home.cdnDesc: CDN plugins for Vite and Webpack, quick resource acceleration setup to improve loading speed
home.microFrontendDesc: Quick comparison learning projects for Vue, React, and Micro Frontend to help you get started easily
home.editorDesc: A collaborative editor based on Yjs + SlateJS, supporting multi-user editing with instant sync, ideal for team collaboration
home.toolboxDesc: A powerful multimedia tool supporting audio/video transcoding, extracting audio/video/subtitles, text-to-speech, screen recording, screenshots, and compression

about.title: About Baize Open Source Team
about.desc: We are a team dedicated to open-source technology innovation, focused on developing high-quality tools and solutions to contribute to the developer community.
about.intro: Baize (白泽), a legendary mythical beast that can distinguish good from evil and understand all things. We chose this name to represent our deep understanding of technology and firm belief in the open-source spirit.
about.missionDesc: Through open-source technology innovation, we lower the development barrier, improve development efficiency, and enable more developers to focus on creating value, driving progress across the entire tech ecosystem.
about.visionDesc: To become a leader in open-source technology, building an open, collaborative, and innovative tech community where the open-source spirit benefits every developer who loves technology.
about.joinDesc: If you love tinkering with technologies and want to contribute to the developer community, welcome to join the Baize Open Source Team!
about.joinStep1: 🌟 Follow our GitHub projects, submit Issues and Pull Requests
about.joinStep2: 💬 Join our tech discussion groups and share your ideas
about.joinStep4: 🚀 Participate in project development and maintenance

imageCompress.title: Image Compression
imageCompress.desc: A professional open-source image compression tool by the Baize team. Supports JPG, JPEG, WebP, and PNG formats. Uses queue + concurrent processing technology for efficient batch compression. Drag and drop to start, with real-time progress and comparison.
imageCompress.freeDesc: Whether it's the website or NPM package, everything is free!
imageCompress.highPerformanceDesc: Uses queue + concurrent协同 processing combined with efficient transfer mechanisms to ensure high-performance system operation

toolbox.title: Baize Toolbox
toolbox.desc: Baize Toolbox is a powerful multimedia tool that provides a wide range of multimedia processing features. Whether you need audio/video transcoding, extracting audio/video/subtitles, text-to-speech (TTS), screen recording, screenshots, or compressing audio, video, and images, this tool can handle it all with ease.
toolbox.freeDesc: Free to use after download and installation

viteCdn.title: Vite CDN Plugin
viteCdn.desc: A library for using public CDNs in Vite.js, including unpkg, jsdelivr and other CDN resources. If loading fails, it automatically switches to the next CDN.

webpackCdn.title: Webpack CDN Plugin
webpackCdn.desc: A library for using public CDNs in Webpack, including unpkg, jsdelivr and other CDN resources. If loading fails, it automatically switches to the next CDN.

quickStudy.title: VUE & REACT & Micro Frontend
quickStudy.desc: A React/Vue3 learning platform based on the micro-app micro-frontend framework. Helps developers quickly master core technologies of both frameworks through comparative learning. Includes practical projects for React Hooks, Vue3 Composition API, state management, routing, as well as micro-frontend architecture and Vite plugin development experience.

baizeEditor.title: Collaborative Document
baizeEditor.desc: Baize Collaborative Document is a collaborative editor based on Yjs + SlateJS, supporting multiple users editing simultaneously with instant synchronization. Built with rich text editing technology, it provides a smooth collaboration experience for team document collaboration, meeting notes, brainstorming, and more.
baizeEditor.realtimeDesc: Multi-user real-time collaborative editing via Yjs + WebSocket, all changes instantly synced to every participant
baizeEditor.richEditorDesc: Supports various rich text formats including headings, lists, code blocks, and more to meet diverse editing needs
baizeEditor.freeOpenDesc: Completely free and open source, can be freely deployed on your own server with full data control

baizeEditorUI.iframeNotSupported: Your browser does not support iframe, please upgrade and try again

imageCompressUI.dragText: Click or drag images here to compress
imageCompressUI.dragHint: Supports single or batch compression, compatible with JPG, JPEG, WebP, PNG formats
